Vector Markup Language: Description extended and given priority over Hypertext Markup Language.
MPEG-2 Transport Stream: Name changed to improve consistency across the MPEG formats. Description improved to offer consistency with other MPEG formats.
MPEG-2 Elementary Stream: Description improved to offer consistency with other MPEG formats. Improved specificity of BOF signature sequence. Added m2v and mpeg to file extensions.
Microsoft Powerpoint Presentation Show: Version number corrected and description updated.
Quark Xpress Data File: Description added and notes field edited to reflect changes in identification for Versions 6 and 10.

MPEG-1 Program Stream: Name changed to improve consistency across the MPEG formats. Description added. Improved specificity of BOF signature sequence and removed EOF signature sequence. Removed priority over Video Object File (MPEG-2 subset)

MPEG-2 Program Stream: Name changed to improve consistency across the MPEG formats. Description added. Improved specificity of BOF signature sequence. Given priority over MPEG-1 Program Stream and removed priority over Video Object File (MPEG-2 subset).
